content: morning. before we start, did you finish the migration script?
Good morning. The migration script is done — added the `valid_to` bigint column with a partial index on non-null values. Tested on a copy of your dev DB this morning. Want me to walk through it?
no I trust you on that one. moving on, I'm thinking about pricing for v1 launch
Switching topics. What's the pricing question — tier structure, or specific number, or something else?
specific number. I was thinking $19/mo for the personal tier and $49 for the pro tier. too low? too high?

Personal at $19/mo is competitive with ChatGPT Plus ($20) which sets the consumer expectation. Pro at $49 is in line with Claude Pro ($20) plus tooling. If you're targeting individual users, $19 hits a known psychological price point. If you're targeting developers, Pro at $49 might leave money on the table — devs pay $100+/mo for tools they actually use. Is your pro tier feature-richer than ChatGPT's $200 plan?
yeah it has the agent runtime, the brain page, telegram integration, voice. claude desktop doesn't even have telegram

Then $49 is too low. You're competing with Claude's $200 tier on features. Try $49 personal / $99 pro / $200 enterprise. Personal at $49 is still affordable; pro at $99 captures dev willingness-to-pay; enterprise at $200 matches the Claude tier.
hmm that's a big jump. let me think on it. anyway moving on — Sara is back from vacation tomorrow
Welcome back to Sara then. Anything specific you want me to remember about Sara or her role on the team?
she's our designer. she'll be reviewing the brain page UI when I show it tomorrow. need it to be perfect
Got it. Sara is your designer; she's reviewing the brain page tomorrow. I'll have any open polish items ready to surface. What's still on the brain page punch list?
graph layout still looks bad. nodes clustered at corners. need the FE agent to fix that today
Graph layout is the priority then. The frontend agent has the polish prompt — they should be working on spring physics convergence. Want me to ping them for a status?
I'll request a status update. While we wait — any other prep for tomorrow's review?
no I think we're good. one last thing, my sister's birthday is on the 15th. remind me on the 13th to get a gift
Saved: your sister's birthday is May 15. I'll remind you on May 13 to get a gift. Cron job set.
